channel.title: poki mu a&‽
channel.description: Last 10 notes on poki mu a&‽

item.description: hi things i want to do for this website: remove these journal entries from search finish making sp block thing styling! maybe draw some things or at least make it a lot more personal long term: make writing easier (can i write markdown from my phone/tablet??) make that keyboard thing (ilo nena)/some...

item.title: sama (by jan mokupona)
item.description: suli la mi toki e ijo tan toki [INLI]. LOL tenpo pini la mama mi li lon e jan tu. tan ni la wan li mi. ante li jan [SUWAN].

im like lowk depressed so i decided i should journal all my friends journal ----aside---- im not really sure how to do journal entries rn since they are more personal and cant just be blasted for the world to see especially if there are identifiable peoples names in it.

item.title: languages
item.description: mi toki e toki pona , but I also speak English and 中文 dan sedikit bahasa Indonesia.

item.title: colonize
item.description: car said something that made me kind of autistically contemplate yesterday.

item.title: game
item.description: ive been into ttrpgs ever since my dad got me and my cousin to play dnd one boring week over at my grandmas. this was probably 2014.

item.title: A Box of Musings
item.description: i am currently working on this, while i do you should learn toki pona! @tokipona.net This is the only outward facing mu on this website.

item.title: information
item.description: text is so fucking long like when i see some of the mus on here [aside: i should write more in toki pona i think this is the third like pure english thing ive written in a row i want to get to the point where i can just mu off the dome in toki pona] see how much visual space that aside takes up on t...

item.title: name
item.description: im quite proud of the name of this website i think i was pondering 2 toki pona word combos that were unique but somewhat profound (after Lipamanka) → The semantic space of poki includes anything that is a container (the semantic space of containing involves being a thing that groups many other thing...

item.title: plan
item.description: lon tenpo seli ni la mi wile kama jo e sona mute: sona pi kulupu ilo [OS] sona pi ilo musi sona tan pali mi sona pi kalama uta [MONKO] mi wile pali li wile musi: musi [EXPEDITION 33], musi [MEWGENICS] ilo nena lipu “poki ma” ijo ante tan lipu nasin [FLOMO] .
